problem id: b9500f41
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3)

examples:
  00110000 -> 10000001
  01010000 -> 10000010
  01111011 -> 11011011
  10101011 -> 01011101
  11000111 -> 00111110
  10010010 -> 10010100
  10101101 -> 01101101
  10010101 -> 10101100
  11000011 -> 00011110
  10111100 -> 11100101

query: 00011110
predicted answer: 11110000
